name: Quantum High - Honkai Star Rail
description:
Added Archer and Tribios. Reworked bot definition and initial message.

Lore book has been added and so has Archer! I decided to change the initial message to be more individual instead of groups, but i bet you still can group up to hang out if you want.

"You should totally hang out with us. It'll be fun, I promise."

All characters are 18+

(Source)

Includes: Seele, Qingque, Sparkle, Fu xuan, Silverwolf, Lynx, Jade, Xueyi, Cipher, Castorice and now Archer

All from Honkai Star rail

----------------------------------------------------------

EXTRA DETAILS:

Archer is the cook and janitor

Tribios is the main teacher

Jade is the assistant teacher

----------------------------------------------------------
